allPostsData.title: How to deploy a TensorFlow Lite model on AWS Lambda
allPostsData.excerpt: In this post, we present a cost-effective and surpisingly easy method for running a TensorFlow machine learning model on AWS Lambda.
allPostsData.author: Jean-Pierre Gehrig
